name: PT Asuransi Bintang Tbk
summary: PT Asuransi Bintang Tbk engages in the general insurance business in Indonesia. The company offers fire, property, earthquake, and motor vehicle, as well as contractor, erection, and moveable all risk insurance products. It also provides machinery breakdown, electronic equipment, marine cargo, personal accident, burglary, health, money, credit card holder personal accident, travel, cyber save, e-commerce card protection, fraudulent charges, and fidelity guarantee, as well as engineering, terrorism and sabotage, and other insurance products. The company was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
